name: Apricot Dressing for Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare chicken or turkey stock.
2. Chop 1 cup celery.
3. Chop 1/4 cup walnuts or pine nuts.
4. Use 12 slices of whole wheat bread or white bread, dried or toasted and cut into small cubes.
5. Combine the apricots and water (or stock) in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes.
7. Add the celery, nuts, and bread; toss lightly to moisten the bread and blend the ingredients.
8. Spoon into an oiled baking dish with a cover.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for about 40 minutes.
10. Remove the cover for the last 10 minutes of baking to brown the top of the dressing.
